title: FoxDreams ModPacks
description: A simple mod build that will boost your FPS and add useful features.
body:
![Photo By FoxDreams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8419d8775012b26c6c2fc1e4f6ec078fb406de51_0.webp)

Hello, dear Minecraft players! I am happy to present you our FoxDreams \ mod build!
This build of mods fully complies with the standards of vanilla Minecraft servers, which minimizes the risk of getting blocked. However, we recommend comparing the modifications and rules of a particular project. 
Below is a brief overview of the modifications included in the build:

### Optimizing modifications:

- **Sodium**: This mod completely redesigns the Minecraft rendering engine, significantly increasing the frame rate (FPS). It is the basis for stable operation of the client.
- **Very Many Players (VMP)**: This mod is designed specifically for servers with a large number of players, which allows you to improve performance under high loads.
- **ModernFix**: This mod fixes bugs in new versions of Minecraft and optimizes their operation, increasing the stability of the game.
- **Bobby**: This mod increases the distance of drawing chunks, bypassing server restrictions, which is ideal for exploring the world.

### Useful add-ons:

- **Xaero's Minimap**: This mod adds a minimalistic map in the upper corner of the screen that shows the terrain, mobs, and players. It is perfect for navigation.
- **Mouse Tweaks**: This mod greatly simplifies inventory management — dragging items and crafting becomes faster and more convenient.
- **Zoomify**: This mod adds the zoom function, which is useful for detailed inspection of buildings or observing objects at a distance.
- **Capes**: Allows players to wear stylish capes, adding personality to your character.
- **ShulkerBox Tooltip**: This mod shows the contents of shulkerbox boxes when you hover the cursor, which saves time when working with inventory.
- **Inventory Profiles Next**: Expands inventory management capabilities-sort, quickly search, and automatically organize items.
- **ModMenu**: This mod adds a convenient menu for viewing and configuring all installed mods right in the game.

These are not all modifications, and we can't provide a complete list, as it may change depending on the release and version of. However, these modifications will always be present in all versions of the\build. 
If you have any questions, do not hesitate to contact me in discord - @pikro _fox. I will be happy to help!
